info.name: PetPetClub Dev — Happy Path (Authenticated)
info.description: Happy-path smoke tests for auth-gated endpoints. A collection-level pre-request script mints HS256 JWTs for three roles ({{USER_TOKEN}}, {{ADMIN_TOKEN}}, {{NGO_TOKEN}}) using {{JWT_SECRET}} so no out-of-band login is needed. Fixed stable IDs from env.json: {{TEST_OWNER_USER_ID}}, {{TEST_PET_ID}}. Also runs a CREATE → DELETE pet cycle to cover POST/DELETE happy paths.

exec: // Mint HS256 JWTs (or use env-provided static tokens) and stash in collection variables.
if (!base)   throw new Error('DEV_BASE_URL is not set');
if (!apiKey) throw new Error('DEV_API_KEY is not set');
if (!value) throw new Error(key + ' is not set');
const wa = typeof input === 'string' ? CryptoJS.enc.Utf8.parse(input) : input;
const userToken  = staticUserToken  || sign({ userId, userEmail: email, userRole: 'user',  iat: now, exp: now + 900 });
const adminToken = staticAdminToken || sign({ userId, userEmail: email, userRole: 'admin', iat: now, exp: now + 900 });
const ngoToken   = staticNgoToken   || sign({ userId, userEmail: email, userRole: 'ngo', ngoId, iat: now, exp: now + 900 });
orderOwnerToken = sign({ userId: orderOwnerUserId, userEmail: orderOwnerEmail, userRole: 'user', iat: now, exp: now + 900 });
// form may be null per doc
// Happy path: either pet has biometrics (200) or explicitly reports notRegistered (404).
pm.test('SKIP: NGO_ACCESS_TOKEN not set (requires real NGO fixture token)', () => pm.expect(true).to.equal(true));
pm.test('SKIP: NGO_ACCESS_TOKEN not set (requires real NGO fixture token)', () => pm.expect(true).to.equal(true));
pm.test('SKIP: NGO_ACCESS_TOKEN not set (requires real NGO fixture token)', () => pm.expect(true).to.equal(true));
pm.test('status is 200 or 405 (frozen on some stages)', () => pm.expect([200, 405]).to.include(pm.response.code));
pm.test('status is 200 or 405 (frozen on some stages)', () => pm.expect([200, 405]).to.include(pm.response.code));

item.name: Pet CREATE → DELETE cycle
item.description: Full POST + DELETE happy path. Creates a throwaway pet via CreatePetBasicInfo, then soft-deletes it so state stays clean.
